sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Min thanna tawh Topa hong paina, Ka mit in mu khin zo
Amah in hehna leenggah kikoihna lo tuan
Kihtak huai a zap tel khua phelep
Anam sau khah khin zo, I Pasian mainawt

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Giahphual za khat kiim a mei taang
Nitak dai nom lak ah biakna tau lam uh Ama aa ding
te mei taang kiaukiau ah sim thei ing

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: lo ding peengkul Amah’n mut hi
A thu khen na tokhom maiah mi hing te lungsim sit hi
aw, amah dawng meng in! nuam in, ka khe!
Nuam huai hi I Pasian mai nawt hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: khat, unok paak hoih lakah Khazih suak khin hi.
Nang le kei hong kikheel sak A ang
Mite siangsak ding hong sih bangin,
ni. Pasian mai nawt lai hi
